metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4998
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1D: Quantitative analysis of synaptotagmin 1 immunogold labeling over presynaptic terminal cytoplasm at synapses in the hippocampus of synaptotagmin 1 KO and WT mice.

Figure 2A: Ultrastructural examination by immunogold EM show SYT1 localization to the presynaptic cytosol, presynaptic active zone, PSD, postsynaptic cytosol and the postsynaptic membrane (quantified in figure 3)

Figure 2B: Ultrastructural examination by immunogold EM shows association of SYT1 to postsynaptic vesicles.

Figure 2D-I: confirmation of postsynaptic localization of SYT1 with IF on dissociated hippocampal culture, co-staining with PSD95.. Experimental description: From M&M: "Anti-synaptotagmin 1 was raised in rabbit and used at for electron microscopy, light microscopy and immunofluorescence. Anti-synaptotagmin 1 (Millipore, MA, Cat#AB5600) was used for EM."
Antibody specificity control shown in Figure 1.
